{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20642_1
|class_id=20642
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=collection@20642_2
|fame=15
|art=31
|fth=14
|civ=13
|tech=17
|ss1=Per Hitman intercepted, Snail HP +10<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss2=Per Hitman intercepted, Snail HP +20<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss3=Per Hitman intercepted, Snail HP +30<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss4=Per Hitman intercepted, Snail HP +30<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss7=Per Hitman intercepted, Snail HP +30<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
